armors.name: Padded Armor
armors.cultural_connection: Standard issue for city watches and poor militia. Often worn under heavier plate.
armors.special_skills: Insulated: Grants a small bonus to survival checks in cold climates.
armors.limitations: Bulky and noisy; the layers of wool and cotton rustle constantly.

armors.name: Leather Armor
armors.cultural_connection: The quintessential 'Adventurer's Gear'. Favored by scouts, thieves, and hunters.
armors.special_skills: Second Skin: Does not restrict movement; perfect for climbing or swimming.
armors.limitations: Offers minimal protection against heavy crushing blows.

armors.name: Studded Leather
armors.cultural_connection: High-end protection for those who value mobility. Often reinforced with silver or iron studs.
armors.special_skills: Reinforced: The metal studs help deflect glancing slashing blows.
armors.limitations: Significantly more expensive than standard leather.

armors.name: Hide Armor
armors.cultural_connection: Deeply tied to Druids, Barbarian tribes, and Monstrous races (Orcs/Gnolls).
armors.special_skills: Primal Presence: Grants a small bonus to Intimidation checks against beasts.
armors.limitations: Needs frequent oiling to prevent rotting in damp biomes (like Fungal Grottos).

armors.name: Chain Shirt
armors.cultural_connection: Often worn by mercenaries and elven scouts. Can be hidden under a traveler's cloak.
armors.special_skills: Concealable: Can be worn under normal clothes with a DC 15 Perception check to notice.
armors.limitations: Weight is concentrated entirely on the shoulders.

armors.name: Scale Mail
armors.cultural_connection: Modeled after dragon scales. Common among professional soldier ranks.
armors.special_skills: Deflect: Advantage on saves against being knocked prone by physical attacks.
armors.limitations: The overlapping scales create a loud clicking sound when moving.

armors.name: Breastplate
armors.cultural_connection: The choice of the 'Dashing Hero'. Protects the vitals without hindering movement.
armors.special_skills: Vital Guard: Critical hits against the user deal no extra damage (10% chance).
armors.limitations: Leaves the arms and legs completely exposed.

armors.name: Half Plate
armors.cultural_connection: The standard for elite veterans and high-ranking officers.
armors.special_skills: Joint Mobility: Provides heavy-tier protection with medium-tier weight distribution.

armors.name: Ring Mail
armors.cultural_connection: A cheaper alternative for heavy-set warriors who lack the coin for chain or plate.
armors.special_skills: Bludgeon Buffer: +1 to AC against bludgeoning damage specifically.
armors.limitations: Inferior protection compared to almost every other heavy option.

armors.name: Chain Mail
armors.cultural_connection: The iconic armor of the Paladin and the Cleric.
armors.special_skills: Slash Resistance: Piercing/Slashing damage reduced by 1 (Non-magical).
armors.limitations: Slows movement significantly if Strength requirement isn't met.

armors.name: Splint Armor
armors.cultural_connection: Functional, ugly, and effective. Favored by Orcish Warchiefs and Dwarven infantry.
armors.special_skills: Iron Wall: Cannot be shoved or moved against your will by creatures of your size or smaller.
armors.limitations: Very stiff; -5 to speed during long-distance overland travel.

armors.name: Plate Armor
armors.cultural_connection: The pinnacle of blacksmithing. A 'Walking Fortress'.
armors.special_skills: Full Deflection: Resistance to all non-magical physical damage while at full HP.
armors.limitations: Extreme cost; user is vulnerable to 'Heat Metal' spells.

armors.name: Shield
armors.cultural_connection: The literal 'shield' between life and death. Often painted with family crests.
armors.special_skills: Shield Bash: Can use as an off-hand weapon to knock a target back 5ft.

apparel.name: Common Clothes
apparel.cultural_connection: Standard peasant wear. Tunics, trousers, and simple boots.
apparel.special_skills: Low Profile: Easier to blend into crowds in urban environments.

apparel.name: Fine Clothes
apparel.cultural_connection: Velvets, silks, and embroidery. Required for high-society events.
apparel.special_skills: Social Grace: Advantage on Persuasion checks in noble courts.

apparel.name: Traveler's Clothes
apparel.cultural_connection: Reinforced wool and heavy boots. Designed for the open road.
apparel.special_skills: Trail-Hardened: Resistance to non-magical 'Cold' during travel phases.

apparel.name: Archmage Robes
apparel.cultural_connection: The pinnacle of wizardry. Only awarded to those who have mastered the weave.
apparel.special_skills: Magic Resistance: Advantage on saves against spells while wearing.
